content:
How to display the current date and time configured on the router system
Command: show clock

How to set the date-time of the router system as <YYYY-MM-DD> and <HH:MM:SS> respectively
Command: config clock date <YYYY-MM-DD> <HH:MM:SS>

How to set the date-time of the router system as 2025-07-04 10:26:40
Command: config clock date 2025-07-04 10:26:40

How to set the timezone of the router system as <timezone>
Command: config clock timezone <timezone>

How to set the timezone of the router system as 'Asia/Seoul'
Command: config clock timezone Asia/Seoul

How to display the current OS image, the image to be loaded on next reboot, and lists all the available images installed on the device
Command: show boot

How to display the cause of the previous reboot
Command: show reboot-cause

How to display the uptime of the router system
Command: show uptime

How to display all the IPv6 neighbor mac addresses
Command: show ndp

How to display the neighbor mac addresses of an IP <ipv6_address>
Command: show ndp <ipv6_address>

How to display IPv6 neighbors learned on interface <interface_name>
Command: show ndp -if <interface_name>

How to display IPv6 neighbors learned on interface Ethernet0
Command: show ndp -if Ethernet0

How to display the state and key parameters of all BFD sessions
Command: show bfd summary

How to display the state and key parameters of all BFD sessions that match an IP <peer_ip>
Command: show bfd peer <peer_ip>

How to display all the details of IPv4 & IPv6 BGP neighbors
Command: show bgp neighbors

How to display the detailed neighbor information of an IP <ipv4_address>
Command: show bgp neighbors <ipv4_address>

How to display all routes advertised to a specific BGP neighbor <ipv4_address>
Command: show bgp neighbors <ipv4_address> advertised-routes

How to display all routes received from a specific BGP neighbor <ipv4_address> (including routes filtered by policies)
Command: show bgp neighbors <ipv4_address> received-routes

How to display all routes accepted from a specific BGP neighbor <ipv4_address> (after applying policies)
Command: show bgp neighbors <ipv4_address> routes

How to display the routing policy that takes precedence over the other route processes that are configured
Command: show route-map

How to display the status of suppress pending FIB feature
Command: show suppress-fib-pending

How to display BGP device global configuration
Command: show bgp device-global

How to shut down all the BGP IPv4 & IPv6 sessions
Command: config bgp shutdown all

How to shut down a BGP session with a neighbor by its IP <ip_address>
Command: config bgp shutdown neighbor <ip_address>

How to shut down a BGP session with a neighbor by its hostname <hostname>
Command: config bgp shutdown neighbor <hostname>

How to start up all the IPv4 & IPv6 BGP neighbors
Command: config bgp startup all

How to start up BGP neighbor using the IP <ip_address>
Command: config bgp startup neighbor <ip_address>

How to start up BGP neighbor using the hostname <hostname>
Command: config bgp startup neighbor <hostname>

How to remove BGP neighbor configuration using the IP <ip_address>
Command: config bgp remove neighbor <ip_address>

How to remove BGP neighbor configuration using the hostname <hostname>
Command: config bgp remove neighbor <hostname>

How to enable the announcements of routes not yet installed in the HW
Command: config suppress-fib-pending enable

How to disable the announcements of routes not yet installed in the HW
Command: config suppress-fib-pending disable

How to display the capabilities of the drop counters on the router
Command: show dropcounters capabilities

How to display the configuration of drop counters on the router
Command: show dropcounters configuration

How to display the statistics of the drop counters on the router.
Command: show dropcounters counts

How to display the configuration of all features on the router system
Command: show feature config

How to display the configuration of the feature <feature_name>
Command: show feature config <feature_name>

How to display the status of all features on the router system
Command: show feature status

How to display the status of the feature <feature_name>
Command: show feature status <feature_name>

How to display the status of auto-restart for all features
Command: show feature autorestart

How to display the status of auto-restart for the feature <feature_name>
Command: show feature autorestart <feature_name>

How to configure the enable state for the feature <feature_name>
Command: config feature state <feature_name> enable

How to configure the disable state for the feature <feature_name>
Command: config feature state <feature_name> disable

How to configure the enable status of auto-restart for the feature <feature_name>
Command: config feature autorestart <feature_name> enable

How to configure the disable status of auto-restart for the feature <feature_name>
Command: config feature autorestart <feature_name> disable

How to display the current statistics for the registered host interface traps
Command: show flowcnt-trap stats

How to clear the current statistics for the registered host interface traps
Command: sonic-clear flowcnt-trap

How to change device hostname as <new_hostname> without traffic being impacted
Command: config hostname <new_hostname>

How to display switch hash global configuration
Command: show switch-hash global

How to display switch hash capabilities
Command: show switch-hash capabilities

How to display the port auto negotiation status for all interfaces
Command: show interfaces autoneg status

How to display the port auto negotiation status for interface <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces autoneg status <interface_name>

How to display the breakout capability for all interfaces
Command: show interfaces breakout

How to display the key fields of all interfaces
Command: show interfaces description

How to display the key fields of interface <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces description <interface_name>

How to display the FEC status of all interfaces
Command: show interfaces fec status

How to display the FEC status of interface <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces fec status <interface_name>

How to display the link-training status of all interfaces
Command: show interfaces link-training status

How to display the link-training status of interface <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces link-training status <interface_name>

How to display the error statistics for all interfaces
Command: show interfaces errors

How to display the error statistics for interface <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces errors <interface_name>

How to display the configured MPLS state for all interfaces
Command: show interfaces mpls

How to display the configured MPLS state for interface <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces mpls <interface_name>

How to display the configured loopback action
Command: show ip interfaces loopback-action

How to display the list of expected neighbors for all interfaces
Command: show interfaces neighbor expected

How to display the list of expected neighbors for interface <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces neighbor expected <interface_name>

How to display information regarding port-channel interfaces
Command: show interfaces portchannel

How to display all interfaces status
Command: show interfaces status

How to display interface status of <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces status <interface_name>

How to display switchport modes status of all interfaces
Command: show interfaces switchport status

How to display switchport modes status of interface <interface_name>
Command: show interfaces switchport status <interface_name>

How to display switchport modes configuration of the interfaces
Command: show interfaces switchport config

How to add the IP address <ip_addr> for interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface ip add <interface_name> <ip_addr>

How to shut down interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface shutdown <interface_name>

How to shut down multiple interfaces <interface_name1>, <interface_list> and <interface_name2>
Command: config interface shutdown <interface_name>,<interface_list>,<interface_name2>

How to start up interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface startup <interface_name>

How to start up multiple interfaces <interface_name1>, <interface_list> and <interface_name2>
Command: config interface startup <interface_name1>,<interface_list>,<interface_name2>

How to configure the speed of <speed_value>G for physical interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface speed <interface_name> <speed_value>000

How to set the coherent module laser frequency of <frequency_value> for interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface transceiver frequency <interface_name> <frequency_value>

How to set the coherent module tx power of <tx_power_value> for interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface transceiver tx_power <interface_name> <tx_power_value>

How to configure the mtu of <mtu_value> for physical interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface mtu <interface_name> <mtu_value>

How to enable the port auto negotiation mode for interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface autoneg <interface_name> enable

How to disable the port auto negotiation mode for interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface autoneg <interface_name> disable

How to remove the MPLS operation on interface <interface_name>
Command: config interface mpls remove <interface_name>

How to display the current interface naming mode
Command: show interfaces naming_mode

How to set the interface naming mode as default
Command: config interface_naming_mode default

How to set the interface naming mode as alias
Command: config interface_naming_mode alias

How to display all the route entries from the routing table
Command: show ip route

How to display the details about all IP interfaces on the device
Command: show ip interfaces

How to display the route-map that is configured for the routing protocol
Command: show ip protocol

How to display all the IPv6 route entries from the routing table
Command: show ipv6 route

How to display the details about all the IPv6 interfaces in the device
Command: show ipv6 interfaces

How to display the route-map that is configured for the IPv6 routing protocol
Command: show ipv6 protocol

How to enable interface <interface_name> to forward L3 traffic
Command: config interface ipv6 enable use-link-local-only <interface_name>

How to disable interface <interface_name> to forward L3 traffic
Command: config interface ipv6 disable use-link-local-only <interface_name>

How to enable use-link-local-only command on all the interfaces globally
Command: config ipv6 enable link-local

How to disable use-link-local-only command on all the interfaces globally
Command: config ipv6 disable link-local

How to display the link local mode of all the interfaces
Command: show ipv6 link-local-mode

How to show the configuration of kernel dump on the router system
Command: show kdump config

How to show the kernel dump files on the router system
Command: show kdump files

How to display the brief summary of all LLDP neighbors
Command: show lldp table

How to display details about all LLDP neighbors
Command: show lldp neighbors

How to display details about the neighbors connected to interface <interface_name>
Command: show lldp neighbors <interface_name>

How to display all the mirror sessions that are configured
Command: show mirror_session

How to display the NAT configuration
Command: show nat config static

How to display the NAT translation statistics for all entries
Command: show nat statistics

How to display the NAT translation for all entries
Command: show nat translations

How to enable the NAT feature on a router
Command: config nat feature enable

How to disable the NAT feature on a router
Command: config nat feature disable

How to clear the dynamic NAT and NAPT translation entries
Command: sonic-clear nat translations

How to clear the statistics of all the NAT and NAPT entries
Command: sonic-clear nat statistics

How to stop the PFC Watchdog on a router
Command: config pfcwd stop

How to set PFC Watchdog counter polling interval to <interval_time> ms
Command: config pfcwd interval <interval_time>

How to enable the PFCWD related counters polling
Command: config pfcwd counter_poll enable

How to disable the PFCWD related counters polling
Command: config pfcwd counter_poll disable

How to start the PFC Watchdog with the default settings
Command: config pfcwd start_default

How to show current PFC Watchdog configuration
Command: show pfcwd config

How to display platform components firmware status information
Command: show platform firmware status

How to display platform components firmware updates information
Command: show platform firmware updates

How to display platform components firmware utility version
Command: show platform firmware version

How to display all the port channels status
Command: show interfaces portchannel

How to add interface <member_portname> as member of <portchannel_name>
Command: config portchannel member add <portchannel_name> <member_portname>

How to delete interface <member_portname> from <portchannel_name>
Command: config portchannel member del <portchannel_name> <member_portname>

How to display the details of Rx & Tx priority-flow-control (PFC) for all ports
Command: show pfc counters

How to display the status of asymmetric PFC for all interfaces
Command: show pfc asymmetric

How to display the status of asymmetric PFC for interface <interface_name>
Command: show pfc asymmetric <interface_name>

How to display the lossless priorities for all interfaces
Command: show pfc priority

How to display the lossless priorities for interface <interface_name>
Command: show pfc priority <interface_name>

How to display the global sFlow configuration
Command: show sflow

How to display the per-interface sflow admin status and the sampling rate
Command: show sflow interface

How to enable the sFlow function globally
Command: config sflow enable

How to disable the sFlow function globally
Command: config sflow disable

How to enable the sFlow function at <interface_name> level
Command: config sflow interface enable <interface_name>

How to disable the sFlow function at <interface_name> level
Command: config sflow interface disable <interface_name>

How to display the startup configuration of the BGP module
Command: show startupconfiguration bgp

How to display the entire running configuration
Command: show runningconfiguration all

How to display the running configuration of the BGP module
Command: show runningconfiguration bgp

How to display the running configuration of the interfaces module
Command: show runningconfiguration interfaces

How to display the running configuration of the syslog module
Command: show runningconfiguration syslog

How to display the running configuration of the acl module
Command: show runningconfiguration acl

How to display the running configuration of all ports
Command: show runningconfiguration ports

How to display the running configuration of port <port_name>
Command: show runningconfiguration ports <port_name>

How to show current routes
Command: show ip route

How to display the status of all subinterfaces
Command: show subinterfaces status

How to display the current CPU usage on the router
Command: show processes cpu

How to display the current memory usage on the router
Command: show processes memory

How to display the summary information about all the processes on the router
Command: show processes summary

How to display the state of all the processes running inside a docker container on the router
Command: show services

How to displays the system-wide memory utilization information on the router
Command: show system-memory

How to display the current summary status of 'Services' and 'Hardware' under monitoring
Command: show system-health summary

How to display a list of all current 'Services' and 'Hardware' being monitored, their status and type
Command: show system-health monitor-list

How to displays the current detail status of 'Services' and 'Hardware' under monitoring
Command: show system-health detail

How to display brief information about all the vlans configured in the device
Command: show vlan brief

How to display all the vlan configuration
Command: show vlan config

How to add vlan <vlan_id>
Command: config vlan add <vlan_id>

How to delete vlan <vlan_id>
Command: config vlan del <vlan_id>

How to add port <member_portname> into vlan <vlan_id>
Command: config vlan member add <vlan_id> <member_portname>

How to delete port <member_portname> from vlan <vlan_id>
Command: config vlan member del <vlan_id> <member_portname>

How to set <image_name> as the default image for subsequent reboots
Command: sonic-installer set_default <image_name>

How to set <image_name> as the image that can be loaded in the next reboot only
Command: sonic-installer set_next_boot <image_name>

How to remove image <image_name> from the disk
Command: sonic-installer remove <image_name>

How to removes all unused images from the device
Command: sonic-installer cleanup

How to collect syslog and core files for the last 24 hours
Command: show techsupport --since=yesterday

How to collect syslog and core files for the last one hour
Command: show techsupport --since='hour ago'

How to enable the memory statistics monitoring feature
Command: config memory-stats enable

How to disable the memory statistics monitoring feature
Command: config memory-stats disable

How to configure the interval for memory data collection to <interval> minutes
Command: config memory-stats sampling-interval <interval>

How to set retention period for memory data to <days_num> days
Command: config memory-stats retention-period <days_num>

How to display historical memory usage statistics on the router
Command: show memory-stats

How to display memory statistics for the last <days_num> days
Command: show memory-stats --from '<days_num> days ago' --to 'now'

How to display memory statistics for the last <hours_num> hours
Command: show memory-stats --from '<hours_num> hours ago' --to 'now'

How to display MPLS AToM pseudowire binding status and parameters
Command: vtysh -c 'show l2vpn atom binding'

How to display summary of BGP neighbor sessions and connection states
Command: vtysh -c 'show ip bgp summary'

How to display OSPFv2 neighbor adjacency status and interface details
Command: vtysh -c 'show ip ospf neighbor'

How to display IS-IS protocol summary including area interfaces and LSP database size
Command: vtysh -c 'show isis summary'

How to display RIP routing table entries and interface statistics
Command: vtysh -c 'show ip rip'

How to display IPv6 OSPFv3 neighbors and their current states
Command: vtysh -c 'show ipv6 ospf6 neighbor'

How to display OSPFv3 Link State Database (LSDB) with LSA details
Command: vtysh -c 'show ipv6 ospf6 database'

How to display MPLS LDP neighbor sessions and operational status
Command: vtysh -c 'show mpls ldp neighbor'

How to display EVPN access VLAN bindings and associated interfaces
Command: vtysh -c 'show evpn access-vlan'

How to display active VNC (Virtual Network Console) session connections
Command: vtysh -c 'show vnc summary'

How to display BGP protocol statistics including message counts and errors
Command: vtysh -c 'show ip bgp statistics'
之江实验室成立于2017年，是由浙江省人民政府主导、浙江大学等一流高校共建的新型科研机构。实验室聚焦智能计算、人工智能、未来通信等前沿领域，致力于打造国家战略科技力量，建设世界一流的智能科技创新高地。
